## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Validation

- [ ] Backend tests pass
- [ ] Frontend lint and unit tests pass
- [ ] Relevant Playwright flows pass
- [ ] Documentation is updated when behaviour changed

## Safety and privacy

- [ ] No credentials, personal lead data, databases, logs, or generated exports are included
- [ ] New data collection or outreach behaviour preserves human review and suppression controls
- [ ] New dependencies have compatible licences and are documented

## Screenshots

Add sanitised before/after screenshots for user-interface changes.
